title: Hootsuite Integration
excerpt:
I would like to use the Hootsuite integration to schedule posts when created in a board, is anyone currently doing this, if yes would you mind sharing your advice as to the best way to set up the board and automations? 
T…

posts.author: DoraKing (Dora King)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to use the Hootsuite integration to schedule posts when created in a board, is anyone currently doing this, if yes would you mind sharing your advice as to the best way to set up the board and automations?

Thanks

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DoraKing! Thanks for posting!

At the moment we don’t have a native integration with HootSuite. Were you looking to use Zapier’s integration?

What’s your main pain point with scheduling posts at the moment? I’d love to learn more so I can offer some suggestions here!

posts.author: DoraKing (Dora King)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, thank you for picking this up! I really like using a calendar view in Monday to plan my posts which I then schedule in hootsuite but I quite often change the schedule to add in a Adhoc social post, this is easy to do in Monday but crossing over to do the same in Hootsuite is a duplication of work and takes longer. I wish the two woud sync so if I move something in Monday it would link to hootsuite and move my scheduled posts around.

posts.author: mondayfunday (Yvette G)
posts.cookedHtml: hi @DoraKing did you ever get this figured out. I’m looking to do the same thing!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! If you’re still figuring this out, shoot us an email at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help out!
